message:
test(wave-51): pure data-type coverage for signal/kind, security/context, record/finalizer

Add 6 tests exercising Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Hash/Default derives:
- signal/kind: SignalKind (Debug, Clone, Copy, Hash)
- security/context: AuthMode, AuthStats (Default), SecurityContext
- record/finalizer: FinalizerEscalation (Default), FinalizerStack

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
